commit_scope: Free the source-backed spec registry list from mandatory Python handling with a native kernel-router route.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request
with urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:19186/api/spec-registry/source-list') as r:
    body = json.loads(r.read())
    print(r.status, r.headers.get('X-Form-Router'), len(body), body[0]['spec_id'], body[-1]['spec_id'], body[-1]['content_path'])
PY
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
local_validation.summary: GET /api/spec-registry/source-list now reads specs/INDEX.md inside the kernel-router manifest and emits SpecRegistryEntry-shaped rows without FastAPI or spec_registry_service. After the new contract joined specs/INDEX.md, the route returned 146 source specs with X-Form-Router:native-kernel and is counted as a kernel-first capable /api route.

known_limitations.observed: The mutable /api/spec-registry list/create/update/delete routes still enter FastAPI. This slice frees the source-backed spec list only.
specs/INDEX.md carries slug, title, and summary. Metrics, timestamps, workspace, and content fields emit conservative defaults until a native frontmatter parser lands.

Full production-routes.fk cross-kernel validate is not used as the pass/fail gate because the manifest's existing source-language section still depends on helper lowering outside the plain validate path. Rust serve plus HTTP assertion is the route behavior proof.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this spec source native route commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted for this source-backed native route slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/spec-registry/source-list is now a kernel-first capable route that reads specs/INDEX.md and returns SpecRegistryEntry-shaped JSON rows without FastAPI or spec_registry_service. Existing /api/spec-registry behavior is unchanged.
test_flows: python3 runtime assertion -> 200 native-kernel 146 active-recipe-tracing-form substrate-render-fabric-v0 specs/substrate-render-fabric-v0.md
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_specs_source_native_route.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py -> 5 passed

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
